A

activateRoute(Route) - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
addNeighbor(int) - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Records that this agent encountered another node with the given ID.
agentById() - Method in class simulation.Environment
Returns an unmodifiable view of the agent registry.
algorithm - package algorithm
 
algorithm.gaaco - package algorithm.gaaco
 
AlgorithmConfig - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Deprecated.
Renamed to GaAcoConfig. Replace all usages of AlgorithmConfig with GaAcoConfig.
algorithmTest - package algorithmTest
 
allAgents() - Method in class simulation.Environment
Returns an unmodifiable view of all deployed sensor-node agents, in deployment order.
allCovered() - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
 
AntColonyOptimization - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Ant Colony Optimisation (ACO) stage of the GA→ACO fusion path planner, with concurrent ant tour construction and multiple iteration loops.
AntColonyOptimization(GaAcoConfig) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.AntColonyOptimization
Constructs an ACO instance using an internally created, non-seeded random.
AntColonyOptimization(GaAcoConfig, Random) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.AntColonyOptimization
Constructs an ACO instance with an externally supplied random source.
AppConfig - Class in config
File-backed configuration for the UAV/WSN simulator.

B

brownianMotion() - Static method in class movement.MarkovChain
Returns a Markov chain using the Brownian-motion transition matrix that appears commented-out in the original MarkOvChain.java.
build() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
builder() - Static method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
Returns a new SimulationConfig.Builder pre-populated from SimulationConfig.defaults().
buildIntelligences() - Method in class config.AppConfig
Builds the list of UAVIntelligence instances specified by run.intelligences.
buildIntelligences(SimulationConfig) - Method in class config.AppConfig
Builds intelligence instances using the provided SimulationConfig instead of the one read from config.properties.
buildSimulationConfig() - Method in class config.AppConfig
Builds a SimulationConfig from the simulation.* properties.

C

calculateDistance(SensorNode) - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Computes the Euclidean distance between this node and another.
CHANGE_DIR - Static variable in class movement.MarkovChain
Motion state 2: node selects a new random direction (0–7).
clear() - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Clears all accumulated knowledge.
clearExplorationTarget() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
clearTrail() - Method in class ui.SimulationPanel
Clears the UAV trail (call between passes).
compareTo(EventScheduler.Event) - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
Events are ordered by ascending time.
config - package config
 
CONFIG_FILE - Static variable in class config.AppConfig
Default config file name, looked up relative to the working directory.
CONTINUE - Static variable in class movement.MarkovChain
Motion state 3: node continues in its current direction.
coverageFraction - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
coverageFraction() - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
Returns the fraction of sectors that have been visited (0.0 = none, 1.0 = all).
CoverageGrid - Class in simulation
Coarse coverage tracker that divides the simulation field into sectors and records which sectors have been scanned by the UAV.
CoverageGrid(int, int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.CoverageGrid
Creates a coverage grid for the given field dimensions and sector size.
createListener(int) - Method in class ui.SimulationGui
Returns a VisualizationListener that feeds simulation snapshots into the panel at panelIndex.

D

DashboardGui - Class in ui
Unified single-window dashboard styled after IntelliJ IDEA Darcula.
DashboardGui(SimulationScenario, AppConfig) - Constructor for class ui.DashboardGui
 
defaults() - Static method in class algorithm.gaaco.AlgorithmConfig
Deprecated.
Use GaAcoConfig.defaults() instead.
defaults() - Static method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a GaAcoConfig with research-calibrated defaults tuned for the standard 1 500 × 1 500 WSN data-collection scenario.
defaults() - Static method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
Returns the default simulation configuration derived from AppConfig.
deltaX(int) - Static method in class simulation.NodeMover
Returns the row delta (Δrow) for the given direction.
deltaY(int) - Static method in class simulation.NodeMover
Returns the column delta (Δcol) for the given direction.
deploy(Environment, SimulationConfig, Random) - Method in interface simulation.NodeDeploymentStrategy
Deploys exactly SimulationConfig.getNodeCount() agents into env using rng for all random decisions.
deployAgent(NodeAgent) - Method in class simulation.Environment
Deploys a sensor-node agent into the environment.
deposit(int, int, double) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Adds delta pheromone to the edge from from to to.
DIRECTION_COUNT - Static variable in class simulation.NodeAgent
Number of supported movement directions (N/S/E/W/NE/NW/SE/SW).
domain - package domain
 
dronePlacement(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
droneRange - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
droneRange(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
droneSpeed(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
duration - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Total number of simulation ticks configured.
duration(long) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 

E

E - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: East (increasing column).
Environment - Class in simulation
The simulation grid and sensor-node registry.
Environment(int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.Environment
Constructs an empty simulation environment.
equals(Object) - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Two sensor nodes are equal if and only if their IDs are equal, regardless of current position.
evaporateAll(double) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Applies global evaporation to every off-diagonal entry.
Event(long, int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
Constructs an event.
EventScheduler - Class in simulation
Priority-queue–based event scheduler for the discrete-event simulation.
EventScheduler() - Constructor for class simulation.EventScheduler
Constructs an empty scheduler.
EventScheduler.Event - Class in simulation
An immutable simulation event.
EXECUTE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.UAV.DriveMode
 
exploratoryWalk() - Static method in class movement.MarkovChain
Returns a Markov chain designed for wide-area exploration.

F

fieldHeight - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Simulation field dimensions (cells).
fieldHeight(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
fieldSize(int, int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
Convenience: set both width and height in one call.
fieldWidth - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Simulation field dimensions (cells).
fieldWidth(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
findAgentsInRange(int, int, int) - Method in class simulation.Environment
Returns all sensor-node agents within Euclidean distance range of (cx, cy), excluding any agent located exactly at that point (squared distance = 0, i.e.
fromScenario(SimulationScenario) - Static method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Creates a runner fully configured from a SimulationScenario.
frontierTarget - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
[x, y] of the nearest unvisited sector centre, or null.

G

GaAcoConfig - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Immutable configuration for the GA-ACO fusion path-planning algorithm and the planning schedule used by GaAcoIntelligence.
GaAcoConfig(int, double, int, int, int, int, double, double, double, double, double, int, int, int, double, int) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Constructs a fully specified, validated GA-ACO + planning configuration.
GaAcoIntelligence - Class in intelligence
UAVIntelligence implementation that combines frontier-based coverage exploration with coverage-gated GA→ACO→LocalSearch path planning.
GaAcoIntelligence(SimulationConfig, GaAcoConfig) - Constructor for class intelligence.GaAcoIntelligence
Constructs a GaAcoIntelligence from simulation and algorithm configurations.
GaAcoPlanner - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Stateless implementation of PathPlanner using a three-stage GA → ACO → LocalSearch fusion pipeline.
GaAcoPlanner(GaAcoConfig) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoPlanner
Constructs a planner that will use the given algorithm configuration for every route-planning call.
GaAcoTest - Class in algorithmTest
Self-contained demonstration of the GA→ACO fusion path planner.
GaAcoTest() - Constructor for class algorithmTest.GaAcoTest
 
GeneticAlgorithm - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Genetic Algorithm stage of the GA→ACO fusion path planner.
GeneticAlgorithm(GaAcoConfig) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.GeneticAlgorithm
Constructs a GA instance using an internally created, non-seeded random.
GeneticAlgorithm(GaAcoConfig, Random) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.GeneticAlgorithm
Constructs a GA instance with an externally supplied random source.
get(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Returns the route at the given index.
get(int, int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Returns the pheromone level on the edge from node from to node to.
getAcoIterationCount() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getAlpha() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getAntCount() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getBest() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Returns the route with the highest fitness value in this population.
getBeta() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getConfig() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoPlanner
Returns the algorithm configuration used by this planner.
getConfig() - Method in class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
 
getConfig() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Field dimensions, timing, drone range, and node parameters for this scenario.
getCoverageGrid() - Method in class intelligence.GaAcoIntelligence
 
getCoverageGrid() - Method in interface simulation.UAVIntelligence
Returns the coverage grid managed by this intelligence, or null if this intelligence does not track field coverage.
getDeploymentStrategy() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Strategy controlling how targets are spatially deployed at the start of each simulation pass.
getDescription() - Method in class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
 
getDescription() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Optional one-line description for documentation / README purposes.
getDirection() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns the movement direction at the time of observation (0–7, same encoding as NodeMover).
getDirection() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
 
getDriveMode() - Method in class simulation.UAV

getDuration() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
getEliteCount() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getExecuteTokens() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
getExplorationTarget() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
getField() - Method in class simulation.Environment
Returns the raw simulation grid.
getFieldHeight() - Method in class simulation.Environment
 
getFieldHeight() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
getFieldWidth() - Method in class simulation.Environment
 
getFieldWidth() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
getFitness() - Method in class algorithm.Route
Returns the fitness of this route.
getGenerationCount() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getId() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns the unique identifier of this node.
getId() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
 
getIntelligenceKeys() - Method in class config.AppConfig
Returns the configured intelligence keys from run.intelligences, filtered to only keys that are actually present in AppConfig.REGISTRY.
getIntelligences() - Method in class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
Returns the intelligence strategies listed in run.intelligences.
getIntelligences() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Ordered list of UAV intelligence strategies to compare in this scenario.
getKnowledgeBase() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
getLabel() - Method in class intelligence.GaAcoIntelligence
 
getLabel() - Method in class intelligence.PredefinedPatrolIntelligence
 
getLabel() - Method in interface simulation.UAVIntelligence
Human-readable label shown in run reports and the GUI sidebar.
getMaxRouteWaypoints() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getMinCoverageBeforePlan() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getMovementStrategy() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Movement model applied to all targets (sensor nodes, drones, etc.) throughout the simulation.
getMutationRate() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getName() - Method in class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
 
getName() - Method in interface simulation.SimulationScenario
Human-readable name shown in run reports and the GUI header.
getNeighborCache() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Returns an unmodifiable view of this agent's neighbour cache.
getNodeCount() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig

getNodeMinSpeed() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
getNodeRange() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig

getPlannerFactory() - Method in class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario

Factory called once per simulation pass to produce a fresh PathPlanner.

getPlanningThreshold() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getPopulationSize() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getQ() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig

getRoutes() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Returns an unmodifiable view of the route list.
getRouteWaypoints() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
getSectorSize() - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
 
getSeed() - Method in class config.AppConfig
Returns the fixed random seed, or AppConfig.NO_SEED if none is set.
getSpeed() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns the movement speed (cells per tick) at the time of observation.
getSpeed() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
 
getTotalDistance() - Method in class algorithm.Route
Returns the pre-computed total path distance.
getTotalTokens() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
getTournamentSize() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
getX() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns the current x-coordinate of this node.

H

hashCode() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
 
hasNeighbor(int) - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Returns true if this agent has previously encountered the node with the given ID.
hasVelocity() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns true if this snapshot carries valid velocity information (direction and speed were recorded at observation time).
homeX - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Home/deployment position of the UAV.
homeY - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Home/deployment position of the UAV.

I

id - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
 
IDLE - Static variable in class movement.MarkovChain
Motion state 0: node does not move this tick.
intelligence - package intelligence
 
interceptPoint(SensorNode, int, int, int) - Method in class intelligence.GaAcoIntelligence
Predictive ballistic intercept for moving sensor nodes.
interceptPoint(SensorNode, int, int, int) - Method in interface simulation.UAVIntelligence
Computes the effective intercept point for a waypoint node during route execution (EXECUTE mode).
isEmpty() - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler
Returns true if no events are currently scheduled.
isHeadless() - Method in class config.AppConfig
Returns true if run.headless=true in the config.
isSectorVisited(double, double) - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
Returns true if the sector containing grid cell (x, y) has already been marked as visited.
isTokenized(int) - Method in class simulation.UAV
 

K

kbSize - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
KnowledgeBase - Class in simulation
Per-UAV accumulator of sensor-node knowledge.
KnowledgeBase() - Constructor for class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Constructs an empty knowledge base.
knownToUav - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
True if the node is in the UAV's knowledge base.
knows(int) - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Returns true if the node with the given ID has been observed.

L

LaunchDialog - Class in ui
Professional modal launch dialog shown before every simulation run.
levyWalk() - Static method in class movement.MarkovChain
Returns a Markov chain using the Lévy-walk transition matrix from the original MarkOvChain.java.
LevyWalkStrategy - Class in movement
Lévy-walk movement strategy — the default mobility model for sensor nodes.
LevyWalkStrategy() - Constructor for class movement.LevyWalkStrategy
Constructs a Lévy-walk strategy using the default Lévy-walk transition matrix from MarkovChain.levyWalk().
LevyWalkStrategy(MarkovChain) - Constructor for class movement.LevyWalkStrategy
Constructs a strategy backed by the given MarkovChain, allowing the caller to supply an alternative mobility model (e.g.
load() - Static method in class config.AppConfig
Loads configuration from config.properties in the working directory.
load(String) - Static method in class config.AppConfig
Loads configuration from the specified file path.
LocalSearch - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Stateless local-search passes for TSP-style open-path optimisation.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class algorithmTest.GaAcoTest
 
MarkovChain - Class in movement
Markov-chain state machine for sensor-node mobility models.
MarkovChain(double[][]) - Constructor for class movement.MarkovChain
Constructs a Markov chain with the given transition matrix.
markScanned(int, int, int) - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
Marks every sector whose centre lies within droneRange of position (x, y) as visited.
motionState - Variable in class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
Markov-chain motion state when the event was scheduled.
move(int[][], NodeAgent, int, int, Random) - Method in class simulation.NodeMover
Attempts to move agent one step in its current direction on the given field.
MOVE - Static variable in class movement.MarkovChain
Motion state 1: node advances one step in its current direction.
movement - package movement
 
MovementStrategy - Interface in simulation
Strategy interface for sensor-node mobility models.
moveStep(int[][], int, int, UAVIntelligence) - Method in class simulation.UAV
 

N

N - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: North (decreasing row).
NE - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: North-East.
nearestUnvisitedCenter(int, int) - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
Returns the (x, y) centre of the nearest unvisited sector from position (fromX, fromY), or null if every sector has already been visited.
nextState(int, Random) - Method in class movement.LevyWalkStrategy
Returns the next motion state for a sensor node currently in currentState.
nextState(int, Random) - Method in class movement.MarkovChain
Advances the chain one step from currentState and returns the next state, selected by roulette-wheel sampling over the row of the transition matrix that corresponds to currentState.
nextState(int, Random) - Method in interface simulation.MovementStrategy
Returns the next motion state given the current state.
NO_SEED - Static variable in class config.AppConfig
Sentinel value meaning "no fixed seed — generate a fresh one per run".
NodeAgent - Class in simulation
A mutable sensor-node agent in the discrete-event simulation.
NodeAgent(int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class simulation.NodeAgent
Constructs a sensor-node agent with the given identity and initial state.
nodeCount(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
NodeDeploymentStrategy - Interface in simulation
Strategy for deploying sensor nodes (or other targets) into the simulation environment at the start of each pass.
nodeId - Variable in class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
ID of the entity this event targets (node ID or 747 for UAV).
nodeIdStart(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
NodeMover - Class in simulation
8-directional grid movement for sensor nodes.
NodeMover() - Constructor for class simulation.NodeMover
 
nodeRange(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
 
nodes - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
NodeSnap(int, double, double, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
 
nodeSpeed(int, int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig.Builder
Convenience: set both min and max node speed in one call.
notifyPassComplete(int, int, int, double) - Method in class ui.SimulationGui
Notifies the GUI that a pass has finished.
NW - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: North-West.

O

observe(SensorNode) - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Records a direct observation of a sensor node.
observe(NodeAgent) - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Records a direct observation from a live NodeAgent.
observeWithTransitiveCache(List<NodeAgent>, Map<Integer, NodeAgent>) - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Records direct observations for a batch of agents and, for each, also ingests the agent's neighbour cache (transitive discovery).
onComplete(int, int, int, double) - Method in interface simulation.SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback
 
onTick(long, UAV, Environment) - Method in class intelligence.GaAcoIntelligence
Updates the coverage grid, steers the UAV toward the nearest unvisited sector during PATROL, and triggers replanning when all conditions are met.
onTick(long, UAV, Environment) - Method in class intelligence.PredefinedPatrolIntelligence
Does nothing.
onTick(long, UAV, Environment) - Method in interface simulation.UAVIntelligence
Invoked once per drone tick, after the UAV has scanned its surroundings and moved one step.
onTick(SimulationSnapshot) - Method in interface ui.VisualizationListener
Called once per drone-event tick with a snapshot of the current simulation state.
orOpt(Route) - Static method in class algorithm.gaaco.LocalSearch
Or-opt local search: relocates single nodes to cheaper positions in the path until no further improvement is possible.

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ui.SimulationPanel
 
pass - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
1 = predefined patrol pass, 2 = autonomous pass.
passLabel - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Human-readable label for the current pass.
PathPlanner - Interface in algorithm
Strategy interface for UAV route-planning algorithms.
PATROL - Enum constant in enum class simulation.UAV.DriveMode
 
peek() - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler
Returns the earliest-scheduled event without removing it, or null if the queue is empty.
PheromoneMatrix - Class in algorithm.gaaco
Encapsulates the pheromone trail matrix used by the Ant Colony Optimisation stage.
PheromoneMatrix(int, double) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Constructs a fresh pheromone matrix for nodeCount nodes.
planRoute(List<SensorNode>) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoPlanner
Plans the optimal route through the given sensor nodes using the GA → ACO → LocalSearch three-stage fusion algorithm.
planRoute(List<SensorNode>) - Method in interface algorithm.PathPlanner
Plans the best route through the given sensor nodes and returns it.
poll() - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler
Removes and returns the earliest-scheduled event, or null if the queue is empty.
Population - Class in algorithm.gaaco
A mutable, ordered collection of Route objects representing one generation in the Genetic Algorithm.
Population(List<Route>) - Constructor for class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Constructs a population from the given route list.
PredefinedPatrolIntelligence - Class in intelligence
No-op UAVIntelligence implementation that represents the predefined four-corner patrol baseline.
PredefinedPatrolIntelligence() - Constructor for class intelligence.PredefinedPatrolIntelligence
 

R

random() - Static method in interface simulation.NodeDeploymentStrategy
Fully random placement: each node is placed at a uniformly random position anywhere in the field.
refine(Route, List<SensorNode>) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.AntColonyOptimization
Refines a GA route using ACO over acoIterationCount iterations and returns the best route found.
registeredKeys() - Static method in class config.AppConfig
Returns all keys currently registered in the intelligence registry.
REGISTRY - Static variable in class config.AppConfig
 
replan() - Method in class simulation.UAV
Triggers replanning through all currently known, untokenised nodes.
replan(List<SensorNode>) - Method in class simulation.UAV
Plans an optimised route through the given target nodes, orients it toward the UAV's current position, and activates it immediately.
reset(double) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Resets every off-diagonal entry to initialValue and every diagonal entry to 0.0.
RETURN_HOME - Enum constant in enum class simulation.UAV.DriveMode
 
returnHome() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
Route - Class in algorithm
An immutable, ordered sequence of SensorNode objects representing one planned UAV path through the sensor network.
Route(List<SensorNode>) - Constructor for class algorithm.Route
Constructs a Route from the given ordered node list.
routeWaypoints - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Ordered list of [x, y] pairs for the active route's waypoints.
run(List<SensorNode>) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GeneticAlgorithm
Runs the full GA over generationCount generations and returns the best route found, after a final 2-opt local-search pass.
run(List<UAVIntelligence>) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Sequential run with an explicit list of intelligence strategies.
run(SimulationScenario) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Runs all intelligences from the given scenario sequentially.
RunConfig - Class in ui
Immutable data class capturing all parameters chosen in LaunchDialog for one simulation run.
RunConfig(SimulationConfig, boolean, long) - Constructor for class ui.RunConfig
 
runInParallel(List<UAVIntelligence>, List<VisualizationListener>, SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Parallel run with an explicit list of intelligence strategies.
runInParallel(List<UAVIntelligence>, List<VisualizationListener>, SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback, boolean) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Parallel run with optional sync mode.
runInParallel(SimulationScenario, SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Headless parallel run of all intelligences from the given scenario.

S

S - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: South (increasing row).
scan(Environment, int) - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
scenarios - package scenarios
 
schedule(long, int, int) - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler
Schedules a new event.
SE - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: South-East.
sectorSize - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
seed - Variable in class ui.RunConfig
Random seed for this run.
SensorNode - Class in domain
Represents a wireless sensor node in the UAV data-collection network.
SensorNode(int, double, double) - Constructor for class domain.SensorNode
Constructs a sensor node with position only (no velocity information).
SensorNode(int, double, double, int, int) - Constructor for class domain.SensorNode
Constructs a sensor node with full velocity information.
set(int, Route) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Replaces the route at the given index.
setCell(int, int, int) - Method in class simulation.Environment
Writes an arbitrary value into a cell.
setDirection(int) - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Sets the agent's movement direction.
setExplorationTarget(int, int) - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
setLiveRange(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the drone scan range at runtime.
setNewRunAction(Runnable) - Method in class ui.SimulationGui
Registers an action that is invoked when the user clicks "New Run".
setSnapshot(SimulationSnapshot) - Method in class ui.SimulationPanel
Thread-safe snapshot update; schedules a repaint on the EDT.
setVisualizationListener(VisualizationListener) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Registers a single VisualizationListener used by the sequential SimulationRunner.run(List) entry point.
show() - Method in class ui.DashboardGui
 
show() - Method in class ui.SimulationGui
Makes the window visible (safe to call from any thread).
show(SimulationConfig) - Static method in class ui.LaunchDialog
Shows the launch dialog on the EDT and blocks until the user dismisses it.
simConfig - Variable in class ui.RunConfig
Field / drone / node configuration for this run.
simulation - package simulation
 
SimulationConfig - Class in simulation
Immutable configuration for the discrete-event UAV/WSN simulator.
SimulationConfig(int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, long) - Constructor for class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
SimulationConfig.Builder - Class in simulation
 
SimulationGui - Class in ui
Professional Swing GUI for comparing N UAV intelligence strategies side-by-side.
SimulationGui(int) - Constructor for class ui.SimulationGui
Convenience overload — no config summary, sync mode off.
SimulationGui(int, SimulationConfig, boolean) - Constructor for class ui.SimulationGui
Creates a GUI for passCount parallel strategy passes with a full configuration summary displayed in the header.
SimulationPanel - Class in ui
Custom JPanel that renders one tick of the UAV/WSN simulation.
SimulationPanel() - Constructor for class ui.SimulationPanel
 
SimulationRunner - Class in simulation
Discrete-event simulation runner for UAV/WSN experiments.
SimulationRunner(SimulationConfig) - Constructor for class simulation.SimulationRunner
Creates a runner for the given field/drone configuration.
SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback - Interface in simulation
Notified when a single simulation pass finishes.
SimulationScenario - Interface in simulation
Composition root for a simulation experiment.
SimulationSnapshot - Class in ui
Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at one drone-event tick.
SimulationSnapshot(long, int, String, long, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, UAV.DriveMode, int, int, int, List<SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap>, List<double[]>, int[], boolean[][], int, double) - Constructor for class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap - Class in ui
Immutable snapshot of a single sensor node's state at one tick.
size() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Returns the number of nodes (the matrix dimension).
size() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Returns the number of routes in this population.
size() - Method in class algorithm.Route
Returns the number of nodes in this route.
size() - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler
Returns the number of pending events.
size() - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Returns the number of distinct nodes currently in the knowledge base.
snapshot() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.PheromoneMatrix
Returns a defensive copy of the full pheromone matrix.
snapshot() - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
Returns an ordered, unmodifiable snapshot of all known nodes, suitable for passing to the algorithm layer.
sortByFitness() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
Sorts the population in descending fitness order (best route first).
stratified() - Static method in interface simulation.NodeDeploymentStrategy
Stratified random sampling (jittered grid): divides the field into a near-square grid of cells and places exactly one node at a random position within each cell.
SW - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: South-West.
syncMode - Variable in class ui.RunConfig
When true all parallel passes are synchronised tick-by-tick via a CyclicBarrier so the GUI shows them frame-for-frame in lock-step.

T

tick - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
time - Variable in class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
Simulation tick at which this event fires.
tokenized - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
True if the UAV has ever been within scan range of this node.
tokens - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
toSensorNode() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Creates an immutable SensorNode snapshot from this agent's current position, direction, and speed.
toString() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
 
toString() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoPlanner
 
toString() - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.Population
 
toString() - Method in class algorithm.Route
 
toString() - Method in class domain.SensorNode
 
toString() - Method in class simulation.EventScheduler.Event
 
toString() - Method in class simulation.KnowledgeBase
 
toString() - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
 
toString() - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
toString() - Method in class simulation.UAV
 
toString() - Method in class ui.RunConfig
 
totalNodes - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Total sensor nodes deployed.
totalSectors() - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
 
twoOpt(Route) - Static method in class algorithm.gaaco.LocalSearch
2-opt local search: iteratively reverses path segments to eliminate crossing edges until no further improvement is possible.

U

UAV - Class in simulation
The UAV (drone) entity in the discrete-event simulation.

UAV_ID - Static variable in class simulation.UAV
 
UAV.DriveMode - Enum Class in simulation
 
UAVIntelligence - Interface in simulation
Strategy interface for a UAV's autonomous decision-making per tick.
uavMode - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
uavX - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
uavY - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
 
ui - package ui
 
updatePosition(int, int) - Method in class simulation.NodeAgent
Updates the agent's grid position.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.UAV.DriveMode
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class simulation.UAV.DriveMode
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
visitedCopy() - Method in class simulation.CoverageGrid
Returns a deep copy of the visited-sector array for GUI rendering.
visitedSectors - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot
Deep-copied visited-sector array, or null for the patrol pass.
VisualizationListener - Interface in ui
Callback interface invoked by SimulationRunner after every drone-event tick when a visualization listener is registered.

W

W - Static variable in class simulation.NodeMover
Direction constant: West (decreasing column).
withAcoIterationCount(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given ACO iteration count.
withAntCount(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given ant count.
withDeploymentStrategy(NodeDeploymentStrategy) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the node deployment strategy used at the start of each pass.
withDroneRange(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
withDuration(long) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
withGenerationCount(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given generation count.
withMaxRouteWaypoints(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given max waypoints.
withMinCoverageBeforePlan(double) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given minimum coverage.
withMovementStrategy(MovementStrategy) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the movement model used by all targets in the simulation.
withMovementStrategyFactory(Supplier<MovementStrategy>) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the movement model with a factory called once per simulation pass.
withMutationRate(double) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given mutation rate.
withNodeCount(int) - Method in class simulation.SimulationConfig
 
withPlanner(PathPlanner) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the path-planning algorithm used by the UAV.
withPlannerFactory(Supplier<PathPlanner>) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Overrides the path-planning algorithm with a factory called once per simulation pass.
withPlanningInterval(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given planning interval.
withPlanningThreshold(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given planning threshold.
withPopulationSize(int) - Method in class algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
Returns a new config with the given population size.
withPosition(double, double) - Method in class domain.SensorNode
Returns a new SensorNode with the same ID and velocity but updated coordinates.
withSeed(long) - Method in class simulation.SimulationRunner
Locks the random seed used for every pass so results are reproducible.
WSNDataCollectionScenario - Class in scenarios
The original MSc thesis scenario: a UAV collecting data tokens from a wireless sensor network deployed across a field configured via config.properties.
WSNDataCollectionScenario() - Constructor for class scenarios.WSNDataCollectionScenario
Loads configuration from config.properties and caches the resulting SimulationConfig.

x - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
 

Y

y - Variable in class ui.SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
